title: Build user token analytics endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint scoped to organization/project from auth context
Queries SDP Postgres for user's issued_tokens via getDb(c.env) + TokenRepository.listByProject
For each token's mint_address: calls RPC for holders (getHolderCount) and supply (getTokenSupply) from rpc-utils
Returns per-token stats + aggregate metrics (total holders, total supply across all user tokens)
Route registered in apps/sdp-api/src/app.ts as v1.route('/data-products/user-analytics', userAnalytics)
